iterations.theme: The Evolution and Product Philosophy of a Long-Standing EdTech Company: From B2B to B2C Apps and Beyond
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast episode, from the introduction to the conclusion, as the total duration of the transcript (44 minutes) fits within the specified block size.

chapters.topic: Company History: teaching.com & reading.com Origin Story
Product Philosophy: Building for User Impact, Not Just Features
The Company Manifesto & Hiring Product-Focused Engineers
Rejecting Agile/Scrum for Creative Freedom & Adaptability
Trial Experiments: Monthly with vs. without Trial
Web-to-App Conversion Success & The Role of Brand Authority
Monetization Beyond Subscriptions: One-Time IAP for Printables
Expanding to Physical Products (Amazon) & LTV Strategy
Unique Challenges of Kids' Apps (Regulations, Analytics, Adult Gates)
Marketing Strategy: Leveraging External Channel Experts
